Australasia's Drilling Partner
Drilling rarely goes exactly to plan. When the ground changes, your reputation is on the line.

The difference is having the right people by your side

We combine proven fluids with real-world expertise to help your crew adapt quickly, stay confident, and keep the job moving — turning unexpected challenges into results your clients remember.

Talk to a Blick Expert Explore Our Solutions

That's when you see why having Blick on your team matters.

We combine proven fluids with real-world expertise to help your crew adapt quickly, stay confident, keep the job moving and turn unexpected challenges into results.

We understand drilling from every angle — the crews in the ground and the engineers and consultants behind the design.

Our goal is simple: when people talk about your work, they talk about how well it went.

Where We Work

Supporting the industries that keep Australasia moving

HDD & Trenchless

Helping contractors and consultants design, plan, and execute trenchless crossings that stay on line and on grade.

Geotechnical & Diamond Coring

Engineering drilling fluids that reduce torque, improve core recovery, and prove capability in complex ground.

Waterwell & Dewatering

Balancing cleaning, stabilisation, and speed to protect hole integrity and equipment performance.

Piling, Tunnelling & Construction

Designing and supporting fluid systems that keep foundations stable and sites productive.

Oilfield & Geothermal

Applying water-based fluid design and on-site support to high-spec, high-pressure operations.

Wherever the ground demands reliability, Blick brings it — through planning, partnership, and performance.
What We Do

We help drilling teams plan, execute, and complete projects with confidence

At the core of our work is Blick Fluids — engineered drilling fluids and additives built for local ground conditions and proven in the field.

We choose partners who share our values — people who build quality products, stand behind their work, and show up when it counts.

Together, we deliver something simple: better outcomes, lower risk, and a smoother path to success.

Trusted Partners

Melfred Borzall Jet Lube Black Diamond Dimatec Fann Grundomat MetaFLO Palmer Bit Premiere Drill Pipe

Blick Fluids

Engineered drilling fluids and additives built for local ground conditions — designed, tested, and refined across Australasia.

On-Site Expertise

Real-world support from a team that understands the ground, your equipment, and the pressure of keeping a project moving.

Fluid Design & Consulting

Custom fluid programs tailored to your geology, method, and performance requirements from the planning stage through to completion.

How We Think

Outcomes don't happen by chance

They come from planning, communication, knowing what to do when the ground changes — and knowing that you have the right team by your side.

At Blick, we cut through complexity and focus on what matters most — getting the result right, first time.

We understand drilling from every angle — the crews in the ground, the engineers behind the design, the councils, and the clients.

Education & Development
Blick Mud Schools
Training & Knowledge

Turning experience into better decisions

Through Blick Mud Schools, we share the insight that turns experience into better decisions and stronger performance.

We help drillers, engineers, and consultants understand their fluids, their ground, and their options — so they can work smarter, safer, and with confidence.

Let's Talk

Every successful project starts with the right conversation

Let's talk about yours.
